title: astelma eximium
intro: Astelma eximium, also known as Mexican valerian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Astelma eximium include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and stress levels, and relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Herbal preparations of Astelma eximium, such as teas and tinctures, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
